LanguageData.EM_ArchotechOathSpine.label: archotech oath spine
LanguageData.EM_ArchotechOathSpine.description:
This spine keeps oracle cognition and self-repair aegis online as a constant governance substrate. Linked effects reroute by state: governor cadence plus lab sync while undrafted, warprotocol lattice in combat, and emergency bulkhead below 50% health.
created/edited by easyrim
